mapper.select: SELECT (s.total_point + COALESCE(SUM(MY_VALUE.value), 0)) AS totalPrice" + "FROM students s LEFT JOIN (SELECT o.student_id, " + "SUM(CASE WHEN o.content = '매수' THEN o.amount ELSE -o.amount END) * " + "COALESCE((SELECT price FROM (SELECT price FROM orders WHERE stock_no = #{stockNo} " + "AND state = '체결' ORDER BY order_date DESC) WHERE ROWNUM = 1), " + "st.publication_price) AS value FROM orders o " + "JOIN stocks st ON o.stock_no = st.stock_no WHERE o.state = '체결' " + "GROUP BY o.student_id, o.stock_no, st.publication_price) MY_VALUE " + "ON s.student_id = MY_VALUE.student_id WHERE s.student_id = #{studentId} " + "GROUP BY s.total_point
SELECT total_point as totalPoint FROM students WHERE student_id = #{studentId}

SELECT COALESCE(SUM(stock_profit), 0) AS totalProfit " + "FROM (SELECT (SUM(CASE WHEN o.content = '매수' THEN o.amount " + "ELSE -o.amount END) * COALESCE((SELECT price FROM (SELECT price FROM orders " + "WHERE stock_no = #{stockNo} AND state = '체결' ORDER BY order_date DESC) " + "WHERE ROWNUM = 1), st.publication_price)) - SUM(CASE WHEN o.content = '매수' " + "THEN o.price * o.amount ELSE 0 END) AS stock_profit FROM orders o " + "JOIN stocks st ON o.stock_no = st.stock_no WHERE o.student_id = #{studentId} " + "AND o.state = #{state} GROUP BY o.stock_no, st.publication_price)
SELECT total_coupon AS totalCoupon FROM students WHERE student_id = #{studentId}
SELECT name FROM stocks WHERE stock_no = #{stockNo}
SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN content = '매수' THEN amount ELSE -amount END) AS amount FROM orders WHERE student_id = #{studentId} AND stock_no = #{stockNo} AND state = #{state}
SELECT (SUM(price * amount) / SUM(amount)) AS average FROM orders WHERE student_id = #{studentId} AND stock_no = #{stockNo} AND state = #{state} AND content = #{content}
SELECT SUM(price * amount) AS purchasePrice FROM orders WHERE student_id = #{studentId} AND stock_no = #{stockNo} AND state = #{state} AND content = #{}

SELECT ((SUM(CASE WHEN content = '매수' " + "THEN amount ELSE -amount END) * (SELECT COALESCE((SELECT price FROM " + "(SELECT price FROM orders WHERE stock_no = #{stockNo} AND state = '체결' " + "ORDER BY order_date DESC) WHERE ROWNUM = 1), st.publication_price) " + "FROM stocks st WHERE st.stock_no = o.stock_no)) - " + "SUM(CASE WHEN content = '매수' THEN price * amount ELSE 0 END)) AS profit " + "FROM orders o WHERE o.student_id = #{studentId} AND o.stock_no = #{stockNo} AND o.state = #{state} " + "GROUP BY stock_no
SELECT DISTINCT stock_no AS stockNo FROM orders WHERE student_id = #{studentId} AND state = #{state}
SELECT coupon_no, name, price FROM coupons
SELECT total_point AS totalPoint FROM students WHERE student_id=#{studentId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO coupon_purchase (coupon_purchase_no, purchase_date, price, name, state, student_id, coupon_no) VALUES(coupon_purchase_no_seq.NEXTVAL, sysdate, #{price}, #{name}, #{state}, #{studentId}, #{couponNo})
mapper.update: UPDATE students SET total_point = total_point - #{price}, total_coupon = total_coupon + 1 WHERE student_id = #{studentId} AND total_point >= #{price}
mapper.select: SELECT name, price FROM coupon_purchase WHERE student_id = #{studentId}
